question_text: From the diagram shown below of a plant cell, which labelled organelle is the site of photosynthesis?

answer_key.explanation: The disc-shaped organelle Q is the chloroplast, which carries out photosynthesis.

visual.caption: Plant cell with labelled organelles.
visual.altText: A cell cross-section drawing with four organelles tagged by single-letter labels at distinct positions.

spec.title: Plant cell
notes: Labels mark four organelles inside the cell.
